name: microfrontends-osmanherrera-site
description: Monorepo for Angular and React portfolio orchestrated by Nginx
author: Osman Herrera

scripts.build:all: npm run build:angular && npm run build:react && npm run build:backend
scripts.start:backend: pm2 restart osmanHerreraSiteBackend || pm2 start osmanHerreraSiteBackend/index.js --name osmanHerreraSiteBackend
